_note: Reference values, TriskeleVM-style. 163 is GREEN. 162 is RED. 164 is RED. A count that DROPS is as suspicious as one that rises: either a deliberate fix (then --update-golden, and the drop is recorded) or a validator that stopped biting.

M3.note: No M3 checker. M3_Schema.shacl.ttl exists (2026-07-03, CONFORMS:True, 13 shapes) but no runner wraps it. An un-instrumented layer is not a passing layer — it is an unmeasured one.

M2.note: No M2 checker. The tscg-generate-mn-grammars skill can produce the SHACL; no runner yet.

M1.note: This is the SC-6 BACKLOG, measured on the real repo (an earlier sandbox estimate of 126 was WRONG). Expected to be non-zero. Lower it ONLY by repairing formulas — never by loosening a shape.

breakdown.DCC006: monoidal operator inside a signature — the bulk of SC-6
breakdown.DCC010: Fm1m2's first argument is not a registered Domain. FOUR PHANTOM DOMAINS: 'Music' (registry says MusicTheory), 'SystemicModeling' (registry says SystemsTheory), 'EnergyGenerators' (absent), 'Cascade' (not a domain at all — that Fm1m2 is an Fm2).
breakdown.GCC009/DCC009: guards appended after the signature. SCALAR guards = M0 measurements leaking into M1 → delete. QUALITATIVE guards (trajectoryShape=Circular) = real semantics → DO NOT DELETE, pending D11/SC-3.
breakdown.DCC008: Amplifier: nested parentheses + `Ft`, which is not a TSCG primitive at all
breakdown.CTX001: 3 WARNINGS (not errors): M1_Domains lacks the 'm2' key in its @context; M1_BusinessModeling lacks 'm3:eagle_eye' and 'm3:sphinx_eye'. Counted in `warnings: 3`, and therefore in by_code too — by_code counts ALL codes emitted, warnings included. Omitting them from the golden set made the gate fail on a reference that was itself incomplete.

M0.note: check_m0_instances.py runs; golden counts not yet captured. Run --update-golden once, REVIEW the numbers, then trust them.

_known_pre_existing_not_counted_here.SHACL_subClassOf_literal: ~500 SHACL violations: rdfs:subClassOf is serialised as a string literal, not an IRI. The 2026-07-03 handover already diagnosed the fix: ONE @context line per file — "rdfs:subClassOf":{"@type":"@id"}.
_known_pre_existing_not_counted_here.SHACL_phantom_knowledgeField: m2:knowledgeField is a phantom property → SC-5 (Domain fusion).
_known_pre_existing_not_counted_here.SHAPE2_vs_SHAPE3: sh:targetClass follows subclasses, so every extension combo is validated TWICE with mutually exclusive requirements. ~256 violations of pure noise → SC-5 must make SHAPE 2 exclude the subclass.
_known_pre_existing_not_counted_here.invalid_URI_warning: 'does not look like a valid URI' — @base resolves to a Windows path. Separate IRI bug.
